mapper.sql: id, warehouse_id, chain_name, node_order, bean_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at

choose.when: select from wcs_profile_chain_node where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} order by chain_name, node_order

insert into wcs_profile_chain_node (warehouse_id, chain_name, node_order, bean_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{warehouseId}, #{chainName}, #{nodeOrder}, #{beanName}, #{enabled}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())

insert into wcs_profile_chain_node (warehouse_id, chain_name, node_order, bean_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{warehouseId}, #{chainName}, #{nodeOrder}, #{beanName}, #{enabled}, now(), now())

insert into wcs_profile_chain_node (warehouse_id, chain_name, node_order, bean_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.chainName}, #{item.nodeOrder}, #{item.beanName}, #{item.enabled}, GETDATE(), GETDATE()

insert into wcs_profile_chain_node (warehouse_id, chain_name, node_order, bean_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values
(#{item.warehouseId}, #{item.chainName}, #{item.nodeOrder}, #{item.beanName}, #{item.enabled}, now(), now())

mapper.update:
update wcs_profile_chain_node
bean_name = #{beanName}, node_order = #{nodeOrder}, enabled = #{enabled},
updated_at = GETDATE() updated_at = now()
where id = #{id}
